Operation 'refundPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The description lacks clarity on input requirements (pay_id parameter details), what is returned (Payment object structure), and side effects (transaction state changes). Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete operation flow and determine appropriate usage.

data.current_description: Initiates a refund for a specific payment transaction identified by pay_id.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a refund for a specific payment transaction identified by pay_id. Requires the payment ID as input. Returns a Payment object reflecting the refunded transaction status. This operation reverses the original payment and updates the transaction state accordingly.
data.reasoning: The description lacks clarity on input requirements (pay_id parameter details), what is returned (Payment object structure), and side effects (transaction state changes). Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete operation flow and determine appropriate usage.

message: Operation 'generatePdf' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Original description is too generic and doesn't specify which transaction type (Payment, Payout, or Link) or what identifier is needed. Added clarity on input requirements, output format, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Generates a PDF document for a specific transaction
data.description_suggestion: Generates a PDF document for a specific transaction. Requires a transaction identifier as input. Returns a PDF file containing transaction details. The PDF can be used for record-keeping, sharing, or archival purposes.
data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't specify which transaction type (Payment, Payout, or Link) or what identifier is needed. Added clarity on input requirements, output format, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'generateTaxInvoice' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_context. Description lacks specificity about what input is required and what the output contains. Added details about input requirements, output structure, and business context (financial records, audits) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

data.current_description: Generates a tax invoice document for accounting purposes
data.description_suggestion: Generates a tax invoice document for accounting and compliance purposes. Requires a transaction identifier as input. Returns a tax invoice document containing itemized transaction details, tax calculations, and compliance information suitable for financial records and audits.
data.reasoning: Description lacks specificity about what input is required and what the output contains. Added details about input requirements, output structure, and business context (financial records, audits) to enable AI agents to understand when and how to use this operation.

Enhanced both to clarify the operation targets Payout objects specifically and to explain what data is included in the CSV output for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Generates a CSV file of the Payout transaction details
data.description_suggestion: Generates a CSV file containing Payout transaction details for bulk export and analysis. Requires payout transaction identifier(s) or filter criteria as input. Returns a CSV file with structured payout data including transaction amounts, statuses, timestamps, and recipient information for use in spreadsheets and data analysis tools.
data.reasoning: Summary is generic and doesn't specify it's payout-specific. Description lacks input parameter details and output structure information. Enhanced both to clarify the operation targets Payout objects specifically and to explain what data is included in the CSV output for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'createSplitLink' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity on how split payments work, what the recipients parameter structure is, what the callback URL does, and what is returned. Enhanced description explains the split distribution mechanism, clarifies all inputs including optional parameters, and specifies the Link response object for better AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: Create a new split payment link
data.current_description:
Generates a new split payment link using the provided recipients, amount, recipient note, and callback URL.
This link can be shared with customers for split payment processing.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a new split payment link that distributes payments among multiple recipients. Accepts recipients list, total amount, recipient note, and optional callback URL for payment notifications. Returns a Link object containing the generated link URL and metadata. The link can be shared with customers to process split payments across specified recipients.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity on how split payments work, what the recipients parameter structure is, what the callback URL does, and what is returned. Enhanced description explains the split distribution mechanism, clarifies all inputs including optional parameters, and specifies the Link response object for better AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getPayInTransactions' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Current description has grammatical issues and lacks specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, specifies that Payment objects are returned, explains what transaction details are included, and better articulates the use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Fetches a  list of incoming payment transactions (pay-ins) for the authenticated user. Useful for monitoring received payments, notification and creation of downstream events
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of incoming payment transactions (pay-ins) for the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Payment objects containing transaction details including amount, status, timestamp, and payer information. Useful for monitoring received payments and triggering downstream event notifications.
data.reasoning: Current description has grammatical issues and lacks specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, specifies that Payment objects are returned, explains what transaction details are included, and better articulates the use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

message: Operation 'getUnusedPaymentLinks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that Link objects are returned with specific fields, explains what 'unused' means (unredeemed), and specifies that pagination and filtering parameters are accepted for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Fetches a paginated list of unused payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for managing and tracking pending payment requests.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of unused (unredeemed) payment links created by the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Link objects containing link details including URL, creation date, amount, and expiration status. Useful for managing and tracking pending payment requests that have not yet been completed.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that Link objects are returned with specific fields, explains what 'unused' means (unredeemed), and specifies that pagination and filtering parameters are accepted for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'getUsedPaymentLinks' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Summary is adequate, but description lacks input and output specificity. Enhanced version clarifies accepted parameters, specifies Link object return type with relevant fields including redemption date and payment status, and improves the use case description for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Fetches a paginated list of used (redeemed) payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for tracking completed payments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of used (redeemed) payment links created by the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Link objects containing link details including URL, creation date, amount, redemption date, and payment status. Useful for tracking and auditing completed payment transactions.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks input and output specificity. Enhanced version clarifies accepted parameters, specifies Link object return type with relevant fields including redemption date and payment status, and improves the use case description for better AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'deletePaymentLink' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary includes release status note that should be removed for clarity. Description lacks specificity about required input (link ID), response format, authorization constraints, and side effects on pending payments. Enhanced version clarifies all inputs, outputs, authorization requirements, and side effects including cancellation of pending payments for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

data.current_summary: (to be released) Delete a payment link
data.current_description: Deletes an existing payment link specified by the link ID. This action is irreversible and the link will no longer be usable.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a payment link by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing payment link specified by the link ID. Requires the link ID as input. This action is irreversible - the link will no longer be usable and cannot be recovered. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful deletion. Only the authenticated user who created the link can delete it. Any pending payments on the link will be cancelled.
data.reasoning: Summary includes release status note that should be removed for clarity. Description lacks specificity about required input (link ID), response format, authorization constraints, and side effects on pending payments. Enhanced version clarifies all inputs, outputs, authorization requirements, and side effects including cancellation of pending payments for comprehensive AI agent understanding.

Operation 'refundPayment' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The description lacks clarity on input requirements (pay_id parameter details), what is returned (Payment object structure), and side effects (transaction state changes). Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete operation flow and determine appropriate usage.

data.current_description: Initiates a refund for a specific payment transaction identified by pay_id.
data.description_suggestion: Initiates a refund for a specific payment transaction identified by pay_id. Requires the payment ID as input. Returns a Payment object reflecting the refunded transaction status. This operation reverses the original payment and updates the transaction state accordingly.
data.reasoning: The description lacks clarity on input requirements (pay_id parameter details), what is returned (Payment object structure), and side effects (transaction state changes). Added these details to help AI agents understand the complete operation flow and determine appropriate usage.

data.current_description: Generates a PDF document for a specific transaction

data.reasoning: Original description is too generic and doesn't specify which transaction type (Payment, Payout, or Link) or what identifier is needed. Added clarity on input requirements, output format, and use cases to improve AI agent interpretability.

data.current_summary: Create a new split payment link
data.current_description:
Generates a new split payment link using the provided recipients, amount, recipient note, and callback URL.
This link can be shared with customers for split payment processing.
data.description_suggestion: Generates a new split payment link that distributes payments among multiple recipients. Accepts recipients list, total amount, recipient note, and optional callback URL for payment notifications. Returns a Link object containing the generated link URL and metadata. The link can be shared with customers to process split payments across specified recipients.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks clarity on how split payments work, what the recipients parameter structure is, what the callback URL does, and what is returned. Enhanced description explains the split distribution mechanism, clarifies all inputs including optional parameters, and specifies the Link response object for better AI agent understanding.

Current description has grammatical issues and lacks specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, specifies that Payment objects are returned, explains what transaction details are included, and better articulates the use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Fetches a  list of incoming payment transactions (pay-ins) for the authenticated user. Useful for monitoring received payments, notification and creation of downstream events
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of incoming payment transactions (pay-ins) for the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Payment objects containing transaction details including amount, status, timestamp, and payer information. Useful for monitoring received payments and triggering downstream event notifications.
data.reasoning: Current description has grammatical issues and lacks specificity. Enhanced version clarifies that results are paginated, specifies that Payment objects are returned, explains what transaction details are included, and better articulates the use case for AI agents to understand when to call this operation.

data.current_description: Fetches a paginated list of unused payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for managing and tracking pending payment requests.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of unused (unredeemed) payment links created by the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Link objects containing link details including URL, creation date, amount, and expiration status. Useful for managing and tracking pending payment requests that have not yet been completed.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks specificity about inputs and outputs. Enhanced version clarifies that Link objects are returned with specific fields, explains what 'unused' means (unredeemed), and specifies that pagination and filtering parameters are accepted for better AI agent decision-making.

Enhanced version clarifies accepted parameters, specifies Link object return type with relevant fields including redemption date and payment status, and improves the use case description for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Fetches a paginated list of used (redeemed) payment links that were created by the authenticated user. Useful for tracking completed payments.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves a paginated list of used (redeemed) payment links created by the authenticated user. Accepts optional filtering and pagination parameters. Returns a list of Link objects containing link details including URL, creation date, amount, redemption date, and payment status. Useful for tracking and auditing completed payment transactions.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate, but description lacks input and output specificity. data.current_summary: (to be released) Delete a payment link
data.current_description: Deletes an existing payment link specified by the link ID. This action is irreversible and the link will no longer be usable.
data.summary_suggestion: Delete a payment link by ID
data.description_suggestion: Deletes an existing payment link specified by the link ID. Requires the link ID as input. This action is irreversible - the link will no longer be usable and cannot be recovered. Returns a confirmation response indicating successful deletion. Only the authenticated user who created the link can delete it. Any pending payments on the link will be cancelled.
data.reasoning: Summary includes release status note that should be removed for clarity. Description lacks specificity about required input (link ID), response format, authorization constraints, and side effects on pending payments. Enhanced version clarifies all inputs, outputs, authorization requirements, and side effects including cancellation of pending payments for comprehensive AI agent understanding.
